subject: PB proposals
body:
The proposals I sent apparently have an error in them so ignore that - I will be receiving a new quote today..I sent them to you so you could see for a sense
The blinds will take 25 days 
There is no quote for the curtains as it depends on which linen sample you choose, but they will take 2 weeks once you decide. 
I am speaking to jeffrey today who is sending me all the paper work for the bedrooms to sign off on which I will do today to get everything in motion asap and have the stuff hopefully delivered next week as early as possible. I will keep you posted




Thx

G
